tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 芃芃黍苗，陰雨膏之。悠悠南行，召伯勞之。 我任我輦，我車我牛。我行既集，蓋云歸哉。 我徒我御，我師我旅。我行既集，蓋云歸處。 肅肅謝功，召伯營之。烈烈征師，召伯成之。 原隰既平，泉流既清。召伯有成，王心則寧。

yt ou we vve ac rll. gg itio uld Our whole host, and our battalions. When our expedition was accomplished, We knew we should return home.
4 Severe was the work at Seay, But the earl of Shaou built the cit)^. Majestic was the march of our host; — The earl of Shaou directed it.
5 The plains and low lands were regulated- — The springs and streams were cleared. The earl of Shaou completed his work, And the heart of the king was at rest.
